This species is a type of fern, specifically a member of the subfamily Dryopteridoideae. It is native to various regions, including tropical and subtropical areas. Dryopteris refulgens is often found growing in shaded, humid environments. Its classification also places it within the order Polypodiales, a group of vascular plants commonly known as polypody ferns.
